# Third-Party Notices

CSTopo can bundle PDAL and its runtime dependencies for standalone Windows builds.

The initial vendor source is the local QGIS/OSGeo4W runtime at `C:\Program Files\QGIS 3.40.12`. Keep license and notice files from the copied runtime with packaged CSTopo builds. PDAL itself is BSD-licensed, but its runtime depends on additional geospatial libraries such as GDAL and PROJ, each with its own notices.
